summary: Completed full backend + frontend testing of multi-tenant auth and instance management for BotForge SaaS. 22/23 backend tests passed (1 test design issue). All major frontend flows verified.

minor.issue: Returns 200 'Email already verified' when user is already verified, even with wrong code. This is technically correct behavior but allows bypassing code validation for verified users. Low risk since verified users can just login directly.

issues: Console errors: 'Failed to load resource: 400' on page load - likely /api/auth/me called before token is set. Not visible to users but worth investigating.

action_items: Minor: Check 400 errors on login page load (console shows failed requests - likely /api/auth/me called without token)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now larger (946 lines) - exceeds 700-line threshold, should be split into modules (auth.py, instances.py, knowledge.py, chat.py)
The verify endpoint returns 200 for already-verified users regardless of code - consider returning 400 for invalid codes even if already verified

success_rate.backend: 96% (22/23 - 1 test design issue, not a backend bug)

seed_data_creation: Created 'FE Test Instance' via UI test. Assigned testuser@example.com to Default Instance during testing.

flows_verified.instances_nav_regular_user: PASS - not visible for regular user
flows_verified.create_instance: PASS - New Instance modal works, instance created with success toast
flows_verified.assign_user: PASS - user@example.com input, Assign User button works, user appears in list with Remove button
flows_verified.regular_user_login: PASS - testuser redirected to /admin with Default Instance auto-selected in sidebar
flows_verified.register_page: PASS - loads with email, password, confirm password fields and validation
flows_verified.instance_switcher: PASS - workspace selector visible in sidebar
flows_verified.no_instance_state_admin: PASS - 'Select an instance to manage it' banner shown when no instance selected

mocked_apis: Email sending via Resend is MOCKED. Verification codes printed to backend logs at /var/log/supervisor/backend.out.log
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant auth fully working. testuser@example.com is assigned to Default Instance. 'FE Test Instance' was created during testing. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_multitenant_auth.py covers 23 test cases for auth, instance CRUD, user assignment, and protected API access. Register flow has 3 fields: email, password, confirm password.
